properties.body: NAVAREA XX 39/26 BARENTS SEA. CHART RUS 10100. 1. MISSILE AND ARTILLERY FIRINGS 0500 TO 1900 UTC DAILY 25 TO 29 MAR NAVIGATION PROHIBITED IN TERRITORIAL WATERS DANGEROUS OUTSIDE IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 70-03.6N 033-38.0E, 70-03.6N 035-26.3E, 69-31.5N 035-26.3E, 69-31.5N 033-38.0E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 292000 UTC MAR 26.= NNNN
